stats_fallback.christened: No traditional christening. Virgin Voyages does not hold godmother ceremonies. Jennifer Lopez was appointed fleet-wide 'Chief Entertainment and Lifestyle Officer' in March 2022 in an announcement tied to Valiant Lady specifically — this is a brand-partnership title, NOT a ship godmother role.
stats_fallback.maiden_voyage: First revenue sailing 18 March 2022 — Summer Soirée Series 'MerMaiden' from Portsmouth, UK (via Zeebrugge). Barcelona Mediterranean MerMaiden 15 May 2022.
stats_fallback.cabins_note: 1,408 cabins with 86% balcony, 93% oceanview. European king beds, Peek-a-Boo showers, Yellow Leaf hammocks on balconies.
stats_fallback.length: 912 ft (277.08 m LOA per VesselFinder / 278 m nominal per Fincantieri)
stats_fallback.builder: Fincantieri S.p.A., Sestri Ponente yard (Genoa, Italy) — hull yard number 6288
stats_fallback.adults_only_note: Strictly 18+. No children's clubs, no kids' menus, no family staterooms, no waterslides.

related.class_notes: Lady Class. Valiant Lady is the SECOND of Virgin Voyages' four Lady Class ships, all built by Fincantieri at its Sestri Ponente yard in Genoa. Lead ship Scarlet Lady (delivered 14 February 2020, yard 6287), third Resilient Lady (delivered 7 December 2022 after an 11-month delay, yard 6289), and fourth Brilliant Lady (formally delivered February 2024 but entered commercial service 5 September 2025 after an 18-month warm lay-up, yard 6304). All four share the Mille platform with identical 110,000 GT / 2,770 guests / 1,160 crew / 1,408 cabins specs. Valiant Lady's unique signature venue is ARIYA — Virgin Voyages' first Indian restaurant at sea — debuting after her 9-25 May 2026 drydock. Ariya is a 220-seat venue developed with celebrity chef Maneet Chauhan, named after Sir Richard Branson's Tamil Nadu ancestor, operating in the Razzle Dazzle space by night (Razzle Dazzle retains its breakfast and brunch by day).

deployment.current_2026_04_11: En route to New York (Brooklyn terminal) from Saint John, New Brunswick, ETA morning of 11 April 2026. Surprise early-season call at Saint John 8 April 2026 opened that port's 2026 cruise season unexpectedly early.
deployment.upcoming_2026: 25 April 2026 — 14-night transatlantic New York → Barcelona via Ponta Delgada, Funchal, Málaga, Tangier, Palma de Mallorca. 9-25 May 2026 drydock (debuts Ariya, Roundabout area updates, Athletic Club updates). Summer 2026 Mediterranean season from Barcelona and Rome (Civitavecchia) with Irresistible Med, French Daze & Ibiza Nights, Spanish Obsession itineraries. Iceland solar eclipse special cruise 5-12 August 2026.
historic_homeports: New York Brooklyn terminal (winter 2025-26 transatlantic turnaround)
deployment.new_york_terminal_note: Virgin Voyages moved its New York sailings from Manhattan to the Brooklyn terminal for the 2026 season.

history.contract_signed: October 2016 (second of four Lady Class ships)
history.steel_cutting: 20 July 2018 at Fincantieri Sestri Ponente, Genoa
history.delivered: 1 July 2021 (per Fincantieri press release — 'double milestone' announcement)
history.covid_delay: Original May 2021 Mediterranean maiden postponed by COVID-19
history.first_revenue_mermaiden: 18 March 2022 — Summer Soirée Series 'MerMaiden' from Portsmouth, UK via Zeebrugge
history.barcelona_mermaiden: 15 May 2022 — arrival at her designated summer Mediterranean homeport, beginning Mediterranean service
history.2022_03_jlo_appointment: March 2022 — Virgin Voyages appointed Jennifer Lopez as fleet-wide 'Chief Entertainment and Lifestyle Officer' in an announcement tied to Valiant Lady (NOT a ship godmother role)
history.2026_04_08_saint_john_early_call: 8 April 2026 — surprise early-season call at Saint John, New Brunswick, opening that port's 2026 cruise season
history.2026_04_25_transatlantic: 25 April 2026 — scheduled 14-night transatlantic from New York to Barcelona
history.2026_05_09_25_drydock: 9-25 May 2026 — two-week drydock debuting Ariya (Virgin's first Indian restaurant at sea) plus Roundabout and Athletic Club enhancements
history.2026_08_05_iceland_eclipse: 5-12 August 2026 — special Iceland solar eclipse cruise

discrepancies_flagged.imo_contamination_check: Verified IMO 9805336 for Valiant Lady against VesselFinder, CruiseMapper, ShipLocation, and Fincantieri press releases. Explicitly cross-checked against Scarlet (9804801), Resilient (9805348), and Brilliant (9870654) — all four sister IMOs are distinct. Note: Valiant 9805336 vs Resilient 9805348 differ by only 12, making this the highest cross-contamination risk pair in the class.
discrepancies_flagged.class_name_wrong: Previous stats JSON said 'Virgin Class'. Virgin Voyages' own in-house class name is 'Lady Class' (a play on 'your ladyship'). Fixed throughout.
discrepancies_flagged.title_leak: Previous page had 'Valiant Lady — Virgin Voyages | In the Wake' as the ship name in multiple places. This leaked the site name into the ship name (validator title-leak error #1324). Fixed throughout to just 'Valiant Lady'.
discrepancies_flagged.delivery_year_wrong: Previous page said 'launched 2022'. Correct: formally delivered 1 July 2021 per Fincantieri press release. First revenue sailing was 18 March 2022 from Portsmouth (COVID delay).
discrepancies_flagged.main_dining_room_hallucination: Previous FAQ said Valiant Lady offers 'the main dining room and buffet'. BOTH statements are WRONG. Virgin Voyages has no main dining room and no buffet on any ship.
discrepancies_flagged.under_construction_banner_removed: Previous page had a 'Page Under Construction' card with placeholder text. Triggered validator #9br. Removed.
discrepancies_flagged.wrong_dining_hero_image: Previous page loaded /assets/img/Cordelia_Empress_Food_Court.webp as the dining hero. Cordelia is a different Indian cruise line — not Virgin Voyages. Removed.
discrepancies_flagged.icp_lite_upgraded: Previous content-protocol was 'ICP-Lite v1.4'. Upgraded to ICP-2 with ship-specific FAQ answers.
discrepancies_flagged.footer_year_2025: Previous footer showed '© 2025 In the Wake'. Updated to auto-year with 2026 noscript fallback.
discrepancies_flagged.no_godmother_invention: Page explicitly states Valiant Lady has no traditional godmother and that JLo is NOT a ship godmother.
discrepancies_flagged.no_cirque: Virgin Voyages has never had Cirque du Soleil. Confirmed in class-wide FAQ.
discrepancies_flagged.deployment_corrected: Brief assumed Valiant was purely a Mediterranean-based ship. Correct as of April 2026: US East Coast rotation now, transatlantic to Barcelona 25 April, drydock 9-25 May, then Mediterranean summer 2026.
discrepancies_flagged.ariya_added: Added Valiant-unique Ariya restaurant (debuting after 9-25 May 2026 drydock) — Virgin Voyages' first Indian restaurant at sea, chef Maneet Chauhan, 220 seats, in the Razzle Dazzle space by night.
